'''famate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadratically|quadratically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-m-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadratically|quadratically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| famate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:famate|famate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:famatesher|famatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:famatesherĂ«m|famatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:famatero|famatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:famateshĂ«|famateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:famateshĂ«m|famateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifamatero|gokifamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifamateshĂ«|gokifamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifamateshĂ«m|gokifamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofamankerom|gofamankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofamankeshĂ«|gofamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofamankeshĂ«m|gofamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofamankeya|gofamankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:famaterom|famaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:famatemu|famatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:famateya|famateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifamaterom|gokifamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifamatemu|gokifamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifamateya|gokifamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:famamate|famamate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:famamatesher|famamatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:famamatesherĂ«m|famamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:famamatero|famamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:famamateshĂ«|famamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:famamateshĂ«m|famamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifamamatero|gokifamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifamamateshĂ«|gokifamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifamamateshĂ«m|gokifamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofamamankerom|gofamamankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofamamankeshĂ«|gofamamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofamamankeshĂ«m|gofamamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofamamankeya|gofamamankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:famamaterom|famamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:famamatemu|famamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:famamateya|famamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifamamaterom|gokifamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifamamatemu|gokifamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifamamateya|gokifamamateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:fĂŠmĂŠte|fĂŠmĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fĂŠmĂŠtesher|fĂŠmĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m|fĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠmĂŠtero|fĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|fĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|fĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠmĂŠtero|gokifĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|gokifĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|gokifĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofĂŠmĂŠnkerom|gofĂŠmĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«|gofĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gofĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofĂŠmĂŠnkeya|gofĂŠmĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠmĂŠterom|fĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠmĂŠtemu|fĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fĂŠmĂŠteya|fĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠmĂŠterom|gokifĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠmĂŠtemu|gokifĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifĂŠmĂŠteya|gokifĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:fafmafte|fafmafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fafmaftesher|fafmaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafmaftesherĂ«m|fafmaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafmaftero|fafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fafmafteshĂ«|fafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafmafteshĂ«m|fafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafmaftero|gokifafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifafmafteshĂ«|gokifafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafmafteshĂ«m|gokifafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofafmafnkerom|gofafmafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofafmafnkeshĂ«|gofafmafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofafmafnkeshĂ«m|gofafmafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofafmafnkeya|gofafmafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafmafterom|fafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafmaftemu|fafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fafmafteya|fafmafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafmafterom|gokifafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafmaftemu|gokifafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifafmafteya|gokifafmafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
